_comment: OpenClaw Command Center Configuration — Copy to dashboard.json and customize

paths._comment: Paths to OpenClaw workspace directories (supports ~ and $HOME)

fleet._comment: Fleet control (mesh / chat / kanban / briefs / evolution / cortex / alerts). Relative dirs resolve against the package root. FLEET_CONFIG_JSON env var (a JSON blob) overrides everything here.

federation._comment: Fleet-of-fleets: poll OTHER Open Fleet Control dashboards' /api/state (plus best-effort pending-lessons enrichment) every intervalMs. Remotes are managed in the Federation panel (state/federation.json); tokens stay server-side. Remotes are READ-ONLY by default — enabling allowWrites per remote (in the panel) unlocks a whitelisted write proxy ONLY for: lesson.approve, lesson.reject, gate.set, task.move. Proxied writes forward the local operator identity (Tailscale-User-Login) and are audited on both sides.

watchdog._comment: Flag assigned/inprogress tasks with no activity for thresholdMs (default 30 min)

validationGate._comment: Default for the evolution lessons gate (true = lessons require approval)

cortex._comment: Paths are user-specific; empty string = adapter unavailable. Typical values: lancedbPath ~/.openclaw/memory/lancedb-pro, gbrainCli ~/gbrain/bin/gbrain, headroomStats ~/.headroom/stats.json, leanCtxStats ~/.lean-ctx/stats.json, lcmDb ~/.lcm/lcm.db. Set enabled=false to disable all cortex CLI probing (availability reports unavailable).

rateLimit._comment: Per user+ip token bucket applied to all mutating /api/fleet routes
